## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content marketing services and potential engagement with ROAR for Good](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing content production (\~$9-25K/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [GrowthX uses AI-assisted workflows to produce high-quality, audience-focused content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [ROAR is shifting focus to enterprise clients and needs help creating cohesive content journeys](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Nate will discuss internally and aim for \~$9K/mo for 6 months, pending budget approval](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Team of experienced marketers/editors from major tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Use AI-assisted workflows to produce high-quality content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Focus on audience-first, intent-based approach](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Typically see traffic uptick around 3 months post-publishing](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### Content Strategy Process

  - [8-week strategy sprint to lay foundation ($20K upfront)](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Develop artifacts like audience personas, tone/voice guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Create topic clusters aligned with audience needs](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Calibrate content quality through iterative feedback](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Content Production Capabilities

  - [Can produce daily content for most clients](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Use AI for research, fact-checking, medical review workflows](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Human editors provide expertise and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Flexible output based on client needs (5-30+ pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Model

  - [Strategy sprint: $20K for 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Ongoing production: $9-25K/month (flexible based on needs)](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=2270.0)
  - [Proposing $9K/month for 6 months as starting point for ROAR](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=2609.0)
  - [Can adjust scope/pricing after initial period](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)

### ROAR's Content Needs

  - [Shifting focus to enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [Need help creating cohesive content journeys](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [Have existing ICPs/personas but lack structured content paths](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [Looking to increase marketing qualified leads for enterprise](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nate to discuss internally and determine budget approval](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=2501.0)
  - [Aim for potential August 11th start date if details finalized soon](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
  - [Kyle to add Nate to contract document for review](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=2786.0)
  - [Potential quick alignment call before weekend](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=2789.0)
  - [Nate to provide approved budget figure (likely \~$8-9K/mo initially)](https://fathom.video/share/nCNTf_wy3Q3pr2FmhRPAVKnpm3exMNqM?tab=summary&timestamp=2609.0)
